name: Kostya Lymar
title: Senior Front-End Developer
summary: Senior Frontend Engineer with 5+ years of experience building scalable web applications and leading frontend development from scratch to production. Specialized in frontend architecture, performance optimization, and real-time systems. Proven track record of delivering complex products (marketplaces, AI platforms, admin systems) and improving system reliability, scalability, and developer workflows. Strong focus on building maintainable systems, optimizing Core Web Vitals, and leveraging AI tools to accelerate development and improve code quality.

bullets: Led frontend development from scratch to production across three products: a marketplace, an admin panel, and SEO-driven landing pages, managing a team of 3–5 engineers
Defined frontend architecture, selected the tech stack, and established scalable development practices from project inception
Built and delivered a full-featured marketplace platform used by 50K+ monthly users, including listings, transactions, and complex user flows with scalable state management
Developed an admin panel for moderation, user management, and operational workflows
Implemented SEO-optimized landing pages in collaboration with the marketing team, increasing conversion rates by ~18% through A/B testing
Hired and mentored frontend developers, contributing to team growth and improving overall development quality
Collaborated closely with product managers, backend engineers, and founders to align technical decisions with business goals
Established end-to-end development processes, including code review standards, PR workflows, task estimation, and release management, reducing time-to-release by ~25%
Set up CI/CD pipelines, logging, and monitoring to ensure production stability and quality control
Implemented real-time features using WebSockets to support marketplace interactions and live updates
Designed scalable state management and data flows for complex user and transaction scenarios
Leveraged AI tools to accelerate development, improve code quality, and streamline pull request workflows
Integrated project workflows with Linear for task tracking, release planning, and team coordination
Supported and scaled the production system post-launch, continuously delivering new features and improving system stability
Developed an AI-powered chatbot platform integrated into third-party products, replacing traditional website support solutions
Built and maintained an embeddable script for seamless integration into client websites, ensuring isolated and secure DOM interaction
Designed and implemented a configurable admin panel for managing chatbot behavior, content, and user interactions
Introduced a structured release workflow (code reviews, PR guidelines, staging validation), reducing production issues by ~30% and improving release stability
Improved deployment reliability and reduced post-release bugs by establishing consistent development and QA practices
Refactored a chaotic frontend codebase into a scalable, modular architecture, improving maintainability and team velocity
Led the migration from Next.js to React where SSR was unnecessary, simplifying the stack and reducing application complexity
Optimized performance (LCP, TTI) through code-splitting, lazy loading, and caching strategies, improving load times by ~30% and reducing bundle size by ~25%
Implemented real-time features using WebSockets to enable responsive chatbot interactions
Built an efficient data layer using TanStack Query (caching, deduplication, background updates)
Integrated monitoring and error tracking with Sentry, reducing debugging time and improving system observability
Contributed to the testing strategy (Jest, React Testing Library), reducing regressions and improving code reliability
Developed and scaled a complex admin panel for a streaming platform used by 10K+ active users
Contributed to building the admin panel from scratch to production
Built multiple configuration modules for stream customization (alerts, banners, widgets, user settings)
Implemented data-heavy dashboards handling 1000+ rows per view, including tables, statistics, and real-time updates
Designed reusable UI components and established a consistent design system across the platform, accelerating feature development
Implemented UI components and contributed to the development of core platform features
Worked on forms, layouts, and interactive elements for stream configuration
Gained hands-on experience across the full product development lifecycle
Collaborated closely with backend engineers to integrate REST APIs and ensure stable and efficient data flow
Collaborated with team members to deliver features and resolve bugs
Contributed to production stability and continuous delivery of new features in a fast-paced environment
